description_long: This is a large, semi-circular chaise with a modern, minimalist design, upholstered in a light gray fabric. The backrest curves smoothly around the seating area, providing continuous support along the arc, and the seat itself is thick and plush, suggesting comfort. Two dark blue accent pillows are placed asymmetrically along the backrest, adding a pop of color and visual interest. The base of the chaise features a subtle blue accent line that runs along the bottom edge, giving it a contemporary touch. The chaise sits directly on the ground with no visible legs, creating a low-profile silhouette. Its generous size and inviting form make it suitable for communal urban spaces such as parks, plazas, or upscale public lounges.
description: A large, semi-circular modern chaise with light gray upholstery, blue accent pillows, and a blue trim at the base. The design is plush, low-profile, and visually striking.
description_view_0: The chaise is seen from an angle, highlighting the curve of the backrest and the placement of one blue pillow near the left side.
description_view_1: A direct front view shows the full arc of the seat, both blue accent pillows, and the continuous backrest.
description_view_2: This angled view emphasizes the right side of the chaise, with one blue pillow visible on the seat and the blue trim along the base.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the smooth, uninterrupted curve of the backrest and the blue accent line at the base.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a continuous, smoothly curved structure that follows the semi-circular shape of the seat, rising to a medium height and providing uniform support. It is unsegmented, with a clean, minimalist appearance and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present; the backrest curves seamlessly without any distinct armrest sections.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the chaise has a solid base that sits directly on the ground, giving it a grounded, low-profile look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid light gray with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two loose, dark blue accent pillows placed asymmetrically along the backrest, with the main seat cushion being a single, thick, continuous piece integrated into the chaise.
